mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meetingParticipants( meetingId, userId, status, message ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT mp.participantId, mp.meetingId, mp.userId, u.nickname, mp.status, mp.message FROM meetingParticipants mp JOIN users u ON mp.userId=u.userId WHERE mp.meetingId=#{meetingId} ORDER BY mp.appliedAt DESC
SELECT mp.participantId, mp.meetingId, mp.userId, u.nickname, mp.status, mp.message FROM meetingParticipants mp JOIN users u ON mp.userId=u.userId WHERE mp.participantId=#{participantId}
mapper.update: UPDATE meetingParticipants SET status=#{status}, approvedAt=CASE WHEN #{status}="APPROVED" THEN NOW() ELSE approvedAt END, cancelledAt=CASE WHEN #{status}="CANCELLED" THEN NOW() ELSE cancelledAt END WHERE participantId=#{participantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants WHERE meetingId=#{meetingId} AND status="APPROVED"
